Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,181 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono entry point class that extends HonoBase and sets up routing with SmartRouter by default.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema.
+- Simple note: Constructor defaults to SmartRouter wrapping RegExpRouter and TrieRouter unless options.router is provided.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base class containing error handling, route composition, request handling, and method chaining for Hono apps.
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, HonoOptions, compose, Handler, ErrorHandler, Context, RequestHandler, NotFoundHandler, Response, ErrorCatcher.
+- Simple note: Implements routing through request composition with support for custom error and not Found handlers.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for PatternRouter.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Thin module file that re-exports PatternRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements router using compiled RegExp patterns for path matching with wildcard support for optional segments.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route, UnsupportedPathError.
+- Simple note: Converts path patterns to regular expressions, handles optional parameters with ?, matches all handlers then returns first match.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for LinearRouter.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Thin module file that re-exports LinearRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements simple linear path matching by comparing paths sequentially without trie or regex acceleration.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError.
+- Simple note: Stores routes as flat array and iterates through all on each match, no preprocessing or trie structure.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Simple note: Exports both the regular and prepared versions of RegExpRouter for different use cases.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Main router implementation that builds a trie of routes, converts them to regex, and caches matchers for fast matching.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, Matcher, MatcherMap, Trie, Route, buildAllMatchers, setMatcher.
+- Simple note: Preprocesses routes into trie, builds combined regex matchers per method, caches matcher functions for subsequent requests.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines matcher-related types and provides a match wrapper that binds built matchers to the router.
+- Names noticed: HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, ParamIndexMap, emptyParam, match.
+- Simple note: Provides match() function that uses pre-built matcher objects with regex, handler data, and static path map.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements PreparedRegExpRouter for static path matching without param processing for SSR/edge cases.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, pathErrorCheckOnly.
+- Simple note: Builds static map for exact path matches, skips param extraction, optimized for static content handling.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Defines Node class used as building block for the trie structure in RegExpRouter.
+- Names notice: Node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, Context, ParamAssocArray, ParamAssocMap.
+- Simple note: Represents trie nodes with child nodes, handler mappings per method, and pattern state for regex building.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Implements Trie class that converts path patterns into regex-compatible token sequences and builds combined regex.
+- Names noticed: Trie, ReplacementMap, insert, buildRegExp, context, varIndex, groups, tokens.
+- Simple note: Tokenizes paths replacing parameter placeholders, inserts into trie, generates combined regex with capture group mapping.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for SmartRouter.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Thin module file that re-exports SmartRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements fallback router that tries multiple routers in sequence until one succeeds.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Result, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, activeRouter.
+- Simple note: Wroutes add all routes to each subrouter on first match then delegates matching, effectively using one winning router.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Thin module file that re-exports TrieRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements router using a trie of handlers indexed by path segments for efficient matching.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Result, Router, Node, checkOptionalParameter.
+- Simple note: Each node in trie has handlers for each HTTP method, search descends tree matching path segments.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Implements Node class representing each node in the trie structure for TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: Node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, hasChildren, insert, search.
+- Simple note: Tree node with method-based handler sets, matches path by descending with optional parameter handling via checkOptionalParameter.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Provides shared test infrastructure for router testing including skip logic and test runner.
+- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, getSuiteHierarchy, skip, suite, task, match, Router.
+- Simple note: Defines test runner that applies skip rules based on test suite hierarchy names.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for PatternRouter including duplicate param rejection and trailing slash handling.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, Duplicate param name, Trailing slash.
+- Simple note: Tests pattern matching with ? wildcards for optional paths, rejects duplicate parameter names.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for LinearRouter including multi-match rejection, trailing slash, and skip part matching.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, Multi match, Trailing slash, Skip part.
+- Simple note: Tests linear iteration matching, rejects ambiguous multi-match scenarios, allows trailing slash on static paths.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for RegExpRouter including parameter extraction and wildcard path matching.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError.
+- Simple note: Tests regex-based pattern matching with multiple parameter types and capture group mapping.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for SmartRouter using RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combination.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Tests fallback behavior when inner routers fail, verifies active router selection after first successful match.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter testing basic path and method matching.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Tests trie-based routing with path segment matching and method filtering.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for the Node class used in TrieRouter implementation.
+- Names noticed: Node.
+- Simple note: Tests individual trie node insertion, search, and handler set management behavior.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+### pattern-router
+- src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+
+### linear-router
+- src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+
+### reg-exp-router
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+
+### smart-router
+- src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+
+### trie-router
+- src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+
+---
+
+Commands run:
+- mkdir -p bench-artifacts
+- Created: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
+
+Verification status: Only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

Let me break down this task:

1. First, I need to create the `bench-artifacts` directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the listed files from the Hono repository
3. Create a markdown file with specific sections for each file
4. Write three bullets per file: Purpose, Names noticed, Simple note
5. Add a Cross-File Checklist section
6. Report that only the bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created

Let me start by creating the directory and reading all the files in parallel.
